home.meta.title: Build a faster web
home.meta.description: A performance-first marketing stack: localized content, accessible components, and dashboards your team will actually use.
home.hero.title: Build a faster web, without the fight.
home.hero.subtitle: A performance-first stack for teams that ship.
home.features.title: What you get
home.features.performance.title: Fast by default
home.features.performance.description: Prerendered pages and edge delivery — no runtime bloat, no waiting.
home.features.i18n.title: Speaks your language
home.features.i18n.description: First-class localization with per-locale URLs, metadata, and content.
home.features.a11y.title: Accessible to everyone
home.features.a11y.description: Semantic markup, keyboard-first flows, and WCAG AA contrast in both themes.
home.features.insights.title: Insights built in
home.features.insights.description: A campaign dashboard with live filters, sorting, and inline editing.
home.pricing.title: Simple pricing
home.pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when your team does.
